subject: The final top ten leaderboard (for Affiliates only)
body:
Mozination -

It's time to reveal the final top ten leaderboard!

And so - without further ado.

Here it is:

Number 1: Christian Mikkelsen 9,925

Number 2: Enzo Carasso 6,978

Number 3: Sasha Stanojilovic  6,040

Number 4: Sean Ferres 5,466

Number 5: Jonathan Montoya 4,711

Number 6: Joshua Brown 2,456

Number 7: Pace Morby 2,208

Number 8: Jayant Kumar Padhi 2,143

Number 9: Tyler Clark 2,063

Number 10: Taki Moore 1,992

Bonus Number 11: Kristof Szabo 1,988

The competition was incredibly fierce. The individuals above took it home. Congratulations guys - I'm looking forward to our AMA together.

For everyone here: I can't repay you for the effort you all put in to promote the book launch. Everyone contributed.

For that, I cannot thank you all enough.

But I can do something…

Keep an eye out for future affiliate emails (like this).

For those interested, I have some special projects we can work on together. Consider this book launch a dry run.

We have something even bigger planned. ;)

Next time it will be more lucrative for everyone here. You will have first access. So stay tuned.

To end: It means the world that you signed up and helped support the mission to make real business available to even just one more person.

You are my kind of people. I'm looking forward to crushing it together.

Alex.

PS - I haven't forgotten about the Two Bonus Chapters.

If you referred ten people or more, I will be sending that to you today along with a little extra - because you guys came through so hard.

It's taken from my new book but more on that later. ;)

PPS - A message for the top ten.

We will be reaching out this week to organize the AMA prize for you and your community. Look out for it. We will be contacting each of you separately.

Once again, well done guys. I'm looking forward to our AMA.
